case_title: ALEXANDRA DOCTER VS. CHRISTOPHER KRONNER et al

docket_entries.description: BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-02-2010 AFTER HEARING- MATTER DID NOT SETTLE.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOCTER, ALEXANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT KRONNER, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-09-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-06-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-24-2010
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KRONNER, CHRISTOPHER
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOCTER, ALEXANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRONNER, CHRISTOPHER $9,667.94 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,667.94, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S) ALEXANDRA DOCTOR. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOCTER, ALEXANDRA SERVED APR-27-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KRONNER, CHRISTOPHER

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-13-2010. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-02-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JUL-09-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JEREMIAH F HALLISEY.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR MURRAY, THOMAS J
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-25-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. JAN-24-2011 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KRONNER, CHRISTOPHER JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOCTER, ALEXANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT KRONNER, CHRISTOPHER
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-18-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HERMANSON, KEVIN J. SUBSTITUTED FOR DEICHLER, ANTHONY CLARK AS ATTORNEY FOR KRONNER, CHRISTOPHER
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOCTER, ALEXANDRA ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
NTC OF CHANGE OF TELEPHONE NUMBER FILED BY DEFENDANT KRONNER, CHRISTOPHER
ARBITRATOR THOMAS J MURRAY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-24-2010 THROUGH DEC-23-2010.
